name: John McLaren Park
note: Archive documents linked to this place; source labels honour the SFPL-vs-Democracy's-Library distinction.

documents.title: San Francisco recycled water master plan and groundwater master plan : draft environmental impact report
documents.creator: San Francisco (Calif.). Planning Dept,San Francisco Public Utilities Commission
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: A 1996 recycled-water master plan EIR evaluates alternative reservoir sites and construction haul routes within McLaren Park.

documents.title: Master plan for the development of McLaren Park
documents.creator: San Francisco (Calif.). Recreation and Park Dept,San Francisco (Calif.). Board of Supervisors,San Francisco (Calif.). City Planning Commission
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: A 1983 master plan sets out a development program for McLaren Park, prepared for the Recreation and Park Department.

documents.title: Minutes
documents.creator: San Francisco Open Space/Park Renovation Citizens Advisory Committee
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: 2000 citizens'-committee minutes weigh a proposed disc golf course at McLaren Park amid community support and opposition.

documents.title: Journal of proceedings, Board of Supervisors, City and County of San Francisco
documents.creator: San Francisco (Calif.). Board of Supervisors
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: A 1954 Board of Supervisors journal records individual parcel purchases required for McLaren Park ($2,400, $700, $500 and less), in conformity with the Master Plan.

documents.title: FY 2007-08 parks annual report : parks scores increased for third year and differences between district averages narrowed
documents.creator: San Francisco (Calif.). Office of the Controller. City Services Auditor Division,San Francisco (Calif.). Recreation and Park Dept
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: A Controller's FY2007-08 parks report grades John McLaren Park at 70.2 percent, down 14.8 points and among its district's low performers.

documents.title: Park standards, 6-month report FY 2009-10 : park scores citywide increased through the first half of FY 2009-10
documents.creator: San Francisco (Calif.). Office of the Controller. City Services Auditor Division
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: A Controller's mid-year FY2009-10 report scores John McLaren Park at 72.9 percent, among the lowest-rated parks.

documents.title: Report on a plan for the location of parks and recreation areas in San Francisco
documents.creator: San Francisco (Calif.). Dept. of City Planning
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: A 1954 parks-location plan lists John McLaren Park at 330 acres among the city's major parks and dates the City's decision to acquire the land to 1926.
